verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Solomon concluded, "All is vanity." Now my heart believes that it is true; Took me all this time to find reality, All I ever really want is You.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: All that really counts, All that's really true, All that really matters Lord, is You; Everything to gain, Nothing now to lose, All I ever really want is You.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: So take the grandest thing you know that life can give, Weigh it with eternity's bright side, One thing I have learned in all this life I live: There is truly nothing good but God.
